title: Flavorful Indulgent Ukrainian Cheese Lasagna
description: This earthy and indulgent Ukrainian dish features dried red chillies and a blend of cheeses, with a plant-based friendly option, and is perfect for a special occasion, the combination of flavors and textures creates a truly satisfying experience

ingredients.name: dried red chillies
ingredients.notes: crushed or 1 teaspoon dried red chilli flakes

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the lasagna noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
In a blender or food processor, combine the crushed dried red chillies, brine-wet tofu, vegan mozzarella shreds, ricotta cheese, salt, and pepper, and blend until smooth.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the blended cheese mixture until it is lightly browned and fragrant.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked lasagna noodles, the cheese mixture, and chopped fresh parsley, if using, and mix well to combine.
Grease a 9x13 inch baking dish with olive oil and begin building the lasagna by spreading a layer of the cheese mixture on the bottom of the dish.

Arrange 4 lasagna noodles on top of the cheese mixture, followed by another layer of the cheese mixture, and repeat this process until all of the ingredients have been used, ending with a layer of cheese on top.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes, then remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the lasagna from the oven and let it cool for 10-15 minutes before slicing and serving.
